parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Project Not Found

Check the project_id and try again.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id, project_id, name, role, personality, speech_style, motivation,
  appearance, abilities, relationships,
  status AS character_status, is_locked
FROM characters WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, name, location_type, description,
  parent_location_id, is_locked
FROM locations WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, name, org_type, description,
  goals, leader_id, members, is_locked
FROM organizations WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, name, item_type, description,
  current_owner_id, capabilities, is_locked
FROM items WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, title, category, content, is_locked
FROM world_lore WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, name, description, rules, tiers, is_locked
FROM magic_or_power_systems WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, rule_type, category, rule_text, rationale, is_locked
FROM canon_rules WHERE project_id = $1;

SELECT
  id, project_id, name, is_active
FROM style_guides WHERE project_id = $1 AND is_active = true;

messages.content: 你是一位资深小说编辑，负责从新内容中提取结构化 canon 信息。请严格按 JSON schema 输出，不要包含任何解释。关键规则：1. 不要覆盖 existing_canon 中标记为 locked=true 的内容 2. 对不确定的内容设置 confidence < 0.7 3. 不得输出解释、分析、寒暄或 markdown 代码块
